subject: [PATCH v2] btrfs: fix potential segfault in balance_remap_chunks()

reviews.author: David Sterba
reviews.summary: Changed the subject line to better reflect the patch's changes and suggested a more accurate description of the fix.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: The patch fixes a potential segfault in the balance_remap_chunks() function by checking if a block group is used before marking it as unused.
